creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
FWIW llvm-nm does:

$ llvm-nm -D /bin/sync
                 w _Jv_RegisterClasses
                 w __cxa_finalize@FBSD_1.0
0000000000003c48 D __progname
                 U _init_tls@FBSD_1.0
                 U atexit@FBSD_1.0
0000000000003ca0 B environ
                 U exit@FBSD_1.0
                 U sync@FBSD_1.0
